senses.gloss: a tree trunk, body, stock, torso

examples.text: وَهُزِّي إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ النَّخْلَةِ تُسَاقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا
examples.english: Shake towards thee the palm’s trunk: it will drop ripe and fresh dates upon thee.

senses.gloss: youth, animal old enough to use (of livestock as well as humans)

etymology.text: Cognate with Classical Syriac ܓܘܙܥܐ (guzʿā, “trunk”), Hebrew גֶּזַע (gézaʿ, “trunk, stock, race”).
